name: Heartland Bottle Club — Monthly Subscription
description: Monthly bottle club membership. Members receive one curated Heartland Spirits release each month — a mix of our current lineup and occasional limited drops not available in the online store. First right of purchase on all limited releases. 10% off all in-store and online orders. Cancel any time.

name: Cask Strength Bourbon 2025 Limited — Bottle Club Drop
description: Bottle Club exclusive access drop: Heartland Cask Strength Bourbon 2025. Barrel 47-B, filled November 2021, bottled October 2025. Non-chill filtered, barrel proof. Deep oak, dried cherry, long char finish. Limit 2 per member. Ships WI residents only per TTB rules.

name: Driftless Gin — Spring Botanical Release
description: Spring 2026 seasonal botanical release of Driftless Gin. This batch features ramps and wild violet from local foragers alongside our base botanical bill of Wisconsin juniper, coriander, and lemon peel. Small-batch, won't last. 88 proof.

name: Heartland 10th Anniversary Single Barrel Bourbon
description: Our 10th Anniversary release: a single barrel of 4-Year Bourbon (Barrel 22-01) hand-selected and set aside by Tyler and Jacob, bottled at cask strength for the anniversary party on October 17, 2026. Deep caramel, toasted oak, and baking spice. One-time release - once it is gone, it is gone. Limit 2 per customer. Ships WI residents only per TTB rules.
